about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a full-stack developer passionate about cutting-edge technology, specializing in building high-performance web applications. Currently studying IoT Engineering at BUPT, focusing on the React/Next.js ecosystem and AI application development. I believe code is an art form, and great products come from relentless attention to detail.
